default.text: ⟦⟦ R̃ãp̃ĩd̃ ãl̃t̃ẽr̃ñãt̃ĩñg̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃ t̃ẽs̃t̃ c̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñc̃ỹ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

fast.text: ⟦⟦ F̃ãs̃t̃ t̃r̃ĩl̃l̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽ s̃t̃ãb̃l̃ẽ r̃h̃ỹt̃h̃m̃ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃. ⟧⟧

extended.text: ⟦⟦ Ẽx̃t̃ẽñd̃ẽd̃ t̃r̃ĩl̃l̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ c̃ãñ c̃ãũs̃ẽ s̃t̃ãb̃ĩl̃ĩt̃ỹ t̃õ d̃r̃ĩf̃t̃ ĩf̃ t̃ẽñs̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

timing_sensitive.text: ⟦⟦ T̃r̃ĩl̃l̃ t̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ ĩs̃ s̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ĩṽẽ,̃ w̃h̃ẽr̃ẽ ĩr̃r̃ẽg̃ũl̃ãr̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃ c̃ãñ q̃ũĩc̃k̃l̃ỹ ãd̃d̃ ũp̃. ⟧⟧

fatigue.text: ⟦⟦ C̃õñt̃ĩñũõũs̃ t̃r̃ĩl̃l̃s̃ õṽẽr̃ l̃õñg̃ s̃t̃r̃ẽt̃c̃h̃ẽs̃ c̃ãñ b̃ũĩl̃d̃ f̃ãt̃ĩg̃ũẽ ãñd̃ ãf̃f̃ẽc̃t̃ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃. ⟧⟧
